description: Implement automated 50-line rule enforcement via ESLint to shift modularization checks from Review to Linting.
suggestion: Add a custom ESLint rule for src/ directory and update orchestration docs to prioritize linting.

description: The following modules in the History domain genuinely require > 50 lines due to complex data orchestration or UI templates, but are capped under 100 lines: src/app/actions/history/cancel.ts (88), src/app/actions/history/core.ts (85), src/app/actions/history/retry.ts (93), src/hooks/useHistory/useHistoryActions.ts (95), src/hooks/useHistory/useHistoryCockpit.ts (81), src/hooks/useHistory/useHistoryData.ts (66), src/app/history/page.tsx (52).
suggestion: Log as technical debt and refactor when domain logic changes.

description: scripts/prune-state.ts exceeds 50-line rule (87 lines). Added annotation, but logic should be extracted in future refactor.
suggestion: Extract pruneFile logic to a utility module.

description: Refactor repository to follow industry-standard directory structure and perform exhaustive cleanup of unwanted/orphaned files (e.g., .tmp_scratch, scratch, verification, old scripts).
suggestion: Create a formal ticket for architectural cleanup and standardisation.

description: E2E test upload-visibility.spec.ts fails due to missing progress-bar-youtube element in Activity Hub.
suggestion: Verify if the progress bar component is correctly rendered for 'uploading' status in HistoryCard.
